section.heading: Cooperation on export financing programs
section.chapeau: The Bank shall, subject to appropriate memoranda of understanding—

paragraph.chapeau: provide complete and current information on all of its programs and financing practices to—

subparagraph.content: the Small Business Administration and other Federal agencies involved in promoting exports and marketing export financing programs; and
State and local export financing organizations that indicate a desire to participate in export promotion; and

paragraph.content: consistent with the provisions of section 4721(f)(2) of title 15, undertake a program to provide training for personnel designated in such memoranda with respect to such financing programs.

section.sourceCredit: (July 31, 1945, ch. 341, § 13, formerly § 19, as added and renumbered § 13, Pub. L. 102–429, title I, §§ 115, 121(c)(7), Oct. 21, 1992, 106 Stat. 2196, 2199.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 13 of act July 31, 1945, ch. 341, was classified to section 635i–1 of this title, prior to repeal by Pub. L. 102–429, § 121(c)(1).
